title: Playhouse Swing Set Attachment
summary: A freestanding bolted 4x4 A-frame with a 4x6 header, sized to attach alongside a playhouse porch rather than stand as its own play structure.
description:
Everything here is bolted, not screwed — a swing set takes real dynamic, repeated leverage on its leg joints every time a child swings, and a bolt through a predrilled hole resists that working-loose motion in a way screws driven into end grain don't. Drill the hole to match the bolt shaft diameter before inserting each bolt; oversizing the hole even slightly turns a snug structural joint into one that can rack over time.

The header doesn't need to be centered on the porch, but it does need to be level and set deep enough that the legs are firmly planted — check with a level before finishing any leg, and dig out from under a leg rather than shim on top of one if it's sitting proud, since a shim under a swing set leg is the first thing to walk out from under repeated motion.

tools.note: Bores the bolt-shaft holes through the 4x4 and 4x6 posts.

steps.title: Cut the legs
steps.body: Cut the 4x4 legs to length. Lay out on a flat, level surface.

steps.title: Attach the top supports
steps.body: Drill a hole sized to the bolt shaft through each leg and top support, then bolt the top supports to the legs.

steps.title: Attach the bottom supports
steps.body: Bolt the bottom supports to the legs the same way.

steps.title: Assemble the frame
steps.body: Assemble the two leg frames with the swing header, using lag screws or bolts to attach the rafter hanger bracket. The swing set doesn't need to be centered on the porch, but check the header for level, digging under any leg that sits proud rather than shimming it, and adjust until it's solid.

steps.title: Add cross bracing if needed
steps.body:
If the frame feels like it needs more rigidity, add cross bracing from the top board into the angled legs.

Sand every exposed surface and finish with an exterior-rated product before installing the swings.

images.alt: Bolted 4x4 swing set frame attached beside a playhouse porch
